summary: Frontend refactoring test complete. All 10 Practice Management tabs are loading correctly after the major refactoring from monolithic PracticeManagementPage.jsx to modular components.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: useCallback in PracticeManagementPage.jsx missing 'headers' dependency (linting warning only)
Code quality is good - proper module separation achieved with shared utilities in shared.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring verified. All 10 Practice Management tabs working: Dashboard (with analytics charts), Clients (list view), Cases (list view), Doc Generator (template selection), Documents (Document Vault with folder filters), Calendar (events list with stats), Tasks (with filters), Invoices (list view), Templates (custom templates), Messages (inbox view). The monolithic PracticeManagementPage.jsx (~3860 lines) was successfully split into 10+ modular components in /app/frontend/src/components/practice-management/

tabs_tested.1_dashboard: PASS - Shows analytics charts (Cases by Status donut, Cases by Type bar, Revenue Trend), key metrics (40 Active Cases, 113 Total Clients, 124 Pending Tasks, TZS 11824K Monthly Revenue)
tabs_tested.2_clients: PASS - Shows client list with search, Add Client button, client details (Name, Type, Email, Phone, Company)
tabs_tested.3_cases: PASS - Shows Cases & Matters list with case details (Case Title, Client, Type, Status, Priority, Court)
tabs_tested.4_doc_generator: PASS - Shows Legal Document Generator with template cards (Power of Attorney, Affidavit, Legal Notice, etc.)
tabs_tested.5_documents: PASS - Shows Document Vault with folder filters (All Documents, Contracts, Correspondence, Court Filings, Evidence, General)
tabs_tested.6_calendar: PASS - Shows Calendar & Events with stats (105 Total Events, 10 Upcoming, 26 Deadlines, 18 Court Hearings), event list
tabs_tested.7_tasks: PASS - Shows task list with filters (All, pending, in progress, completed), stats (141 Total Tasks, 17 Completed, 12 Overdue, 37 Urgent)
tabs_tested.8_invoices: PASS - Shows invoice list with New Invoice button, displays invoice numbers, amounts, and status
tabs_tested.9_templates: PASS - Shows Custom Templates with Create Template button, existing templates with Use/Edit/Delete actions
tabs_tested.10_messages: PASS - Shows Messages inbox with Inbox/Sent/Archived filter tabs

refactoring_verification.shared_utilities: API, ConfirmDialog, DateTimePicker, DonutChart, BarChart, statusColors, typeColors, formatFileSize, formatCurrency
